message:
feat(cli): add ms import command for skill extraction from documents

Adds the `ms import` CLI command that extracts skills from unstructured
text documents. Features include:

- Auto-detection of input formats (markdown, plaintext, AGENTS.md, system prompts)
- Batch import mode for processing entire directories
- Multiple output formats: markdown with YAML frontmatter, pure YAML, TOML
- Interactive mode with classification signal inspection
- Robot mode with structured JSON output
- Lint integration with optional auto-fix
- Configurable confidence thresholds
- Metadata hints (id, name, domain, tags)
- Dry-run mode for preview without writing files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
